tests.key: toDateKey › formats a date as YYYY-MM-DD
toDateKey › zero-pads single-digit months and days
toDateKey › uses the local day, not UTC
cardForDate › is deterministic for a given date
cardForDate › spreads different dates across different cards
cardForDate › always returns a card from the deck
cardByIndex › finds the card with the given arcana number
cardByIndex › falls back to the first card for an out-of-range index
addToHistory › keeps entries newest-first
addToHistory › never keeps two entries for the same day
addToHistory › sorts an older entry into position
addToHistory › handles an empty history
today › returns the real day when nothing is seeded
today › honours a seeded override
loadDaily › creates a new face-down draw when nothing is stored
loadDaily › returns the stored draw when it belongs to today
loadDaily › moves a revealed stale draw into history
loadDaily › discards a stale draw that was never revealed
revealToday › marks the draw revealed and persists it
revealToday › leaves the original draw untouched
loadHistory › returns an empty list when nothing is stored
loadHistory › returns the stored entries
useDailyCard › starts empty before storage answers
useDailyCard › exposes the loaded card and its date
useDailyCard › reports an already-revealed card as revealed
useDailyCard › reveals optimistically and persists the reveal
useDailyCard › does not write again when the card is already revealed
useDailyCard › ignores a reveal that arrives before the card has loaded
useDailyCard › counts past cards
useDailyCard › ignores a load that lands after unmount
clamp › leaves values within one card either side untouched
clamp › caps anything further out at one card
slotSamples › returns three samples for every property
slotSamples › puts the centre slot at rest upright, centred and at full opacity
slotSamples › drops, tilts and dims the neighbouring slots at rest
slotSamples › lands an arriving neighbour in the exact centre pose
slotSamples › sends the departing centre card into the exact side pose
slotSamples › holds outer slots at the capped tilt and dimming
useTurnUp › stays face-down when there is no card
useTurnUp › is still face-down in the moment the card arrives
useTurnUp › has not turned before the delay has elapsed
useTurnUp › turns face-up once the delay has elapsed
useTurnUp › returns to face-down when the card is cleared
useTurnUp › turns again for a newly chosen card
useTurnUp › cancels a pending turn when unmounted
shuffledDeck › returns all 22 arcana with no duplicates and no omissions
shuffledDeck › leaves the source deck untouched
shuffledDeck › produces a different order across repeated draws
